compiled_state.title: Surface PR size guidance during implementation planning
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## PR Size Limits as Proactive Guidance

Activate sets a clear 400-line PR size guideline. DSO's review workflow has 300/600 line thresholds for model escalation/rejection, but doesn't guide PR sizing proactively. PR size is only surfaced reactively at review time — by then the work is already done and splitting is costly.

Surface PR size guidance earlier in the workflow — during implementation planning, not just at review time:
- Implementation-plan should estimate diff size per task and flag tasks likely to exceed the 300-line threshold
- Tasks exceeding the estimate should be split proactively during planning, not at review time
- Preplanning should consider PR size when slicing stories — vertical slices should produce reviewable PRs
- Sprint batching should be aware of cumulative diff size per commit/PR
- The 300/600 line thresholds from the review workflow should be referenced as planning constraints, not just review triggers
